name: Vvveb With Mariadb
tagline: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.
description:
Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

Docs: https://docs.vvveb.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  vvveb:
    image: vvveb/vvvebcms:latest
    volumes:
      - vvveb-data:/var/www/html
    environment:
      - DB_ENGINE=mysqli
      - DB_HOST=mariadb
      - DB_USER=uae7db2f4d3
      - DB_PASSWORD=19759d891a9a63eb03bd30844333443c
      - DB_NAME=${MARIADB_DATABASE:-vvveb}
    depends_on:
      mariadb:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42136:80
  mariadb:
    image: mariadb:11
    volumes:
      - vvveb-mariadb-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=b68992df0cd3b912cf6561f74de29d11
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MARIADB_DATABASE:-vvveb}
      - MYSQL_USER=uae7db2f4d3
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=19759d891a9a63eb03bd30844333443c
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - healthcheck.sh
        - --connect
        - --innodb_initialized
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  vvveb-data: null
  vvveb-mariadb-data: null
